Careers

Are you a result-driven professional hungry to make an impact on the world? Does the idea of building great products excite you? Do you love working with like-minded individuals to improve the lives of others? If you answered yes to any of the above questions, we just may have a place for you at Voyar.

At Voyar, we are reinventing inter-city travel. We understand that great work is dependent on the exceptional work culture and a clear vision. As a result, we encourage the formation of new ideas and creative solutions. You’ll never hear us say the phrase “It’s impossible.”

Join us today to experience the thrill of seeing your ideas applied in the real world and directly impact the lives of thousands positively. Submit your resume using the form below if you are interested in a career at Voyar.

Technical Manager

Responsibilities:

Invent new algorithms to enhance the performance of our Optimization engine, both in terms of the quality of the solutions produced (e.g., sharing rate) and in terms of the speed at which we can converge to those high-quality solutions.
Produce scalable and performant solutions to computationally hard (and often intractable) problems.
Contribute to the invention of novel solutions to fleet partners’ operational problems by collaboratively working with product managers, co-developers, and our client success team.
Contribute to a distribute
